project_name: 30-ui-bench - Sprint 10 execution packet and Sprint 11 ready packet
phase: Sprint 10 - Wave 2 verified closeout and Sprint 11 packet preparation

user_stories.title: Reset Project 30 governance surfaces
user_stories.description: Align Project 30 instructions, plan, status, acceptance, and execution guide to workspace bootstrap and deterministic orchestration.
acceptance_criteria: Project-local instructions describe Project 30 as the factory and governance repo rather than a standalone runtime app.
PLAN.md, STATUS.md, ACCEPTANCE.md, and EXECUTION-GUIDE.md match the active sprint packet and handoff note.
Sprint activation scaffold exists for workspace scrum-tool execution.

user_stories.title: Deliver Wave 2 routes in the Project 37 client surface
user_stories.description: Implement and verify the Wave 2 identity and operator-shell routes in 37-data-model/ui with explicit route wiring and mock-safe behavior.
acceptance_criteria: The five Wave 2 routes are wired in the client router.
Targeted tests pass for the active route set.

user_stories.title: Prepare FK-aware and ontology-view follow-up
user_stories.description: Define the Sprint 11 ready packet for relation-aware UX guidance once Project 37 confirms remaining dependencies.
acceptance_criteria: A timestamped dependency note exists for any required Project 37 runtime view work.
The ready packet remains separate from the active execution packet.
Project 30 guidance explains when to escalate back to Project 37 instead of inventing runtime payloads.

blockers: Project 37 UI lint now exits 0 after the react-hooks plugin fix, but 578 warning-level findings remain across generated API and type surfaces and should be burned down outside the verified Wave 2 route set.
Project 37 still owns runtime seeding for some related layers, so Project 30 must not invent production payloads for unseeded data.

metadata.notes: Execution pair at 2026-03-16 09:07 UTC: 10.1 complete, 10.2 complete after fresh 6/6 focused tests, build pass, warning-only lint pass, and MTI 72; 11.1 remains ready. The live packet phase now reads 'Sprint 10 / A1 Act closeout, Sprint 11 ready packet'. Consumes live Project 37 contracts; no new data-model layers are introduced by this packet.
